title: Loot Beams 3D
description: RPG-like loot beams what will help you find any items on the ground!
body:
# ✨ Loot Beams 3D

Make your drops epic! This mod adds aesthetic 3D beams to all dropped items.

## 🔥 Features
* **Visual Clarity**: Never lose your items in grass again.
* **Rarity Colors:** 
    * 🟢 **Common:** Green/White
    * 🔵 **Rare:** Blue (Iron, Gold, etc.)
    * 🟣 **Epic:** Purple (Diamond, Netherite)
    * 🟠 **Legendary:** Gold (Totems, Stars, Elytra)
* **Smooth Animations:** Beams breathe and rotate gently.
* **Satellites:** Legendary items have orbiting particles to highlight their value.
